## Decorators

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a

### explore

>  explore (reason:str='', blocking:list[str]|None=None,
>               alternatives:list[str]|None=None)

*Mark a function as experimental/exploratory.*

This decorator is a no-op at runtime but attaches metadata that can be
used by tooling to track experimental code.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>reason</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Why this approach is being explored.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>blocking</td>
<td>list[str] | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>What’s blocking progress on this exploration.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>alternatives</td>
<td>list[str] | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Other approaches being considered.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Callable</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Decorated function with attached metadata.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/explore.py#L91"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### extract

>  extract (target:str, section:str='', priority:str='medium',
>               depends_on:list[str]|None=None, breaking:bool=False)

*Mark a function as ready for extraction to the main codebase.*

This decorator is a no-op at runtime but attaches metadata that
indicates the function should be moved to `nbs/`.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>target</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Target notebook path, e.g., “nbs/00_utils/04_nb.ipynb”.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>section</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Section header to place the function under.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>priority</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>medium</td>
<td>Extraction priority: “low”, “medium”, or “high”.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>depends_on</td>
<td>list[str] | None</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Package dependencies needed by this function.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>breaking</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>Whether extracting this would break existing API.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Callable</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Decorated function with attached metadata.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### migrated

>  migrated (to:str, version:str='', redirect:bool=True)

*Mark a function as migrated to the main codebase.*

When `redirect=True`, calls to the decorated function will be
automatically redirected to the new location with a deprecation warning.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>to</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Full import path to the new location,<br>e.g.,
“nbdev_mcp.utils.nb.my_function”.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>version</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Version when the migration occurred.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>redirect</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, automatically redirect calls to new location.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Callable</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Decorated function that redirects to new
location.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Tests

``` python
# Test @explore decorator
@explore(reason="Testing algorithm", blocking=["need data"])
def test_explore_fn():
    return "explored"

assert test_explore_fn() == "explored"
assert test_explore_fn._maturity == "explore"
assert test_explore_fn._explore_meta.reason == "Testing algorithm"
assert test_explore_fn._explore_meta.blocking == ["need data"]
```

``` python
# Test @extract decorator
@extract(
    target="nbs/00_utils/04_nb.ipynb",
    section="## Cell Utilities",
    priority="high",
    depends_on=["nbdev_mcp.utils.paths"]
)
def test_extract_fn(x: int) -> int:
    return x * 2

assert test_extract_fn(5) == 10
assert test_extract_fn._maturity == "extract"
assert test_extract_fn._extract_meta.target == "nbs/00_utils/04_nb.ipynb"
assert test_extract_fn._extract_meta.priority == "high"
assert test_extract_fn._extract_meta.section == "## Cell Utilities"
```

``` python
# Test @migrated decorator (no redirect)
@migrated(to="nbdev_mcp.utils.paths.expand", version="0.2.0", redirect=False)
def test_migrated_fn(path):
    return str(path)

assert test_migrated_fn("/test") == "/test"
assert test_migrated_fn._maturity == "migrated"
assert test_migrated_fn._migrated_meta.to == "nbdev_mcp.utils.paths.expand"
assert test_migrated_fn._migrated_meta.version == "0.2.0"
```

``` python
# Test get_maturity utility
assert get_maturity(test_explore_fn) == "explore"
assert get_maturity(test_extract_fn) == "extract"
assert get_maturity(test_migrated_fn) == "migrated"
assert get_maturity(lambda: None) is None
```

``` python
# Test get_extract_targets
import types
test_module = types.ModuleType('test_module')
test_module.test_extract_fn = test_extract_fn
test_module.test_explore_fn = test_explore_fn

targets = get_extract_targets(test_module)
assert len(targets) == 1
assert targets[0] == ('test_extract_fn', 'nbs/00_utils/04_nb.ipynb', 'high')
```
